work_unit: 全量深度审计: 提交安全链 (auto-commit + main-branch-protection + post-edit-check)
situation: audit-cycle-state=cycle-complete → 触发新全量审计。engine-skills-extracted 的提交安全链三件套从未深审过，且 scout-scan 显示 autonomous-engine #1 推荐但已无未审 Python runtime。选 ESE 提交安全链作为高价值审计目标。
action: 并行 3 个 sonnet sub-agent 分别深审自动提交、主分支保护、编辑后检查三个模块。读取所有脚本+SKILL.md，追踪数据流、安全边界、与引擎契约一致性。
outcome_evidence: 产出 audit-2026-07-03-010.md (39 findings: 9H/13M/10L/7I)。核心发现: extracted skill 与 live 部署严重脱节(MBP-F009)、凭证泄露链(AC-F002+F005)、5种gate bypass(MBP-F001~F005)、零observability。派生9条P0/P1 route-fix待下轮起逐个派发。
next_suggestion: 派生 AC-F002 fix: auto-commit.py git add -A → git add <filtered files>，扩展敏感文件排除列表
派生 AC-F005 fix: EXCLUDED_PREFIXES 增加 .env*/\*.pem/\*.key/credentials* 模式
派生 PEL-001 fix: post-edit-lint.py file_path 加 realpath + workspace root 边界校验
MBP-F001~F005 打包为 sync-from-live: 将 extracted gate 同步到 live 版本(517L)

audit_findings.finding: git add -A stages all files including sensitive ones; is_excluded only filters display list
audit_findings.remediation: Replace git add -A with git add <filtered-paths>; extend exclusion to .env/*.pem/*.key
Add sensitive file patterns to exclusion list

audit_findings.finding: TOCTOU race between autonomous mode check and commit operation
audit_findings.remediation: Add file lock or double-check before commit

audit_findings.finding: Docstring says 'never push' but code pushes; SKILL.md self-contradictory
cmd.split() not shell-aware; eval/bash -c bypass gate
No command-chain segmentation; A && git commit bypasses
audit_findings.remediation: Split on &&/||/;/| and evaluate each segment

audit_findings.finding: Path traversal: file_path not validated against workspace root
Extracted version severely diverged from live (194L vs 517L); all hardening missing
audit_findings.remediation: Sync extracted skill with live deployed version; add CI check
